results.title: Products used by MentalHappy
results.content:
Figma

FigmaThe collaborative interface design tool

4.9 (1.5K reviews)

Team collaboration software

•

Wireframing

•

Interface design tools

What mattered most choosing it: A single source of truth from design to build. As a near-solo team, I needed design and dev to live in one place that's instant to share and prototype in the browser — no handoff friction, no installs. That's what won it over the alternatives. Alternatives I considered: Sketch, Adobe XD, Framer Pro tip: Set up components and variables early — even with a tiny team it keeps everything consistent and makes a full rebuild like 3.0 go fast. Share one live prototype link instead of screenshots so feedback always lands in context.

Subscribe

SocialFacebookInstagram [...] Also considered:

ChatGPT by OpenAIChatGPT by OpenAI

What mattered most choosing it: It's the reason a solo founder could rebuild MentalHappy end-to-end. I used Claude to architect the system, write and review code, and produce specs and docs. What set it apart from other models: the depth of reasoning on a real codebase, and enough context to hold the whole system in its head at once. Alternatives I considered: ChatGPT (GPT-4), Gemini, GitHub Copilot Pro tip: Make it write the plan before the code — have it architect and spec first, then build against that. Then point it back at its own output to review. Feeding it the whole system as context is what unlocks solo-founder speed.

Productivity 2

Loom

LoomEasily record and share videos

4.8 (161 reviews)

results.title: Tutor LMS 3.0 Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
slow support (1)

Report

 11 views

•1 review

I've been using Tutor LMS for a while now, and the new 3.0 version update has taken it to the next level! The plugin is incredibly user-friendly, with a seamless setup process and an intuitive interface. The new features and improvements, especially in the course builder and student management, are fantastic. I love the added flexibility and customization options that make it easier to create a personalized learning experience. The support team is always helpful and responsive. Overall, TutorL MS 3.0 has truly enhanced the way I manage my online courses. Highly recommend it!

#### What's great

user-friendly interface (3)easy setup (1)flexibility and customization (1)support team (1)course builder (2)student management (1)

# Tutor LMS 3.0 Reviews

### The community submitted 6 reviews to tell us what they like about Tutor LMS 3.0, what Tutor LMS 3.0 can do better, and more.

5.0

Based on 6 reviews

Review Tutor LMS 3.0? [...] 5.0

Based on 6 reviews

Review Tutor LMS 3.0?

Tutor LMS 3.0 has received overwhelmingly positive feedback for its user-friendly interface and comprehensive features. Users appreciate the seamless course creation and management experience, with many highlighting the new course builder and native eCommerce capabilities as standout features. The platform's focus on simplifying processes without losing functionality is praised, making it suitable for both small and large-scale eLearning platforms. The integration of AI-powered tools and built-in subscription management further enhances its appeal, positioning Tutor LMS 3.0 as a robust and cost-effective solution for online education.

Hey everyone, we’re shipping three huge Framer updates today. 1. Use Agents on the canvas to design, write, analyze, and organize your site. Including ways to connect your own AI’s like Claude Code or Codex to Framer. 2. Branching gives your team a safer way to try ideas before you publish. 3. The new Framer Community gives creators a place to share work and earn from it. Try them out and tell us what you think!
